hero.eyebrow: For founders who won't hire full-time outbound
hero.subtext: Mirvo finds your buyers, catches the moment they’re ready, and drafts the email. You approve. Meetings land on your calendar. From $149/mo — no salary, no benefits, no 6-week ramp.
hero.ctaPrimary: Start free trial — no credit card
hero.trustLine: 14 days free · Cancel anytime · Setup in under an hour

problem.headline: Outbound shouldn't take 5 tools to set up.
problem.body1: For most founders, cold outreach starts the same way. You buy a data tool. You add an enrichment layer. You set up a sending platform with deliverability tooling. You glue in a multichannel sequencer. You stitch a booking link at the end.
problem.body2: Five subscriptions. Eight hours of setup. A new ICP definition copied across each tool. And every Monday morning, something is broken or out of sync.
problem.pullquote: It's the modern outbound stack — and it's why most founders give up on cold outreach.

solution.headline: One product. One price. One founder-friendly setup.
solution.body1: Mirvo is the outbound role you'd otherwise hire a Sales Development Rep (SDR) to run — sourcing the right buyers, drafting the emails, handling replies, and booking meetings. Except Mirvo does not need a salary, doesn't need a 6-week ramp, and doesn't need three tools to do its job.
solution.body2: From $149/mo. 14 days free. Zero stack to assemble.
solution.cta: Start free trial — no credit card

howItWorks.headline: Live in under an hour. Meetings land on your calendar.
howItWorks.subtext: Most outbound stacks need 2–3 weeks of warmup before sending the first email. Mirvo warms up your inbox in the background, so you ship Day 1 and let the cadence build from there.
howItWorks.step0Body: Industry, company size, role, region. Five minutes in a guided setup. Mirvo does the rest.
howItWorks.step1Body: Sourcing prospects. Drafting personalized emails. Watching for your buying signals. Sending follow-ups. You approve in one click — or set autopilot once you trust the cadence.
howItWorks.step2Body: When a prospect says yes, Mirvo books the meeting on your calendar. You wake up to a Morning Brief. You show up to the call.
howItWorks.warmupTitle: Warmup running automatically, since the moment you signed up.
howItWorks.warmupBody: No 14-day delay. No DNS rabbit-hole. Mirvo handles deliverability in the background while you ship.
howItWorks.disclaimer: Outbound cadence pace varies by ICP, copy quality, and reply patterns. Mirvo's job is to keep it moving.

pricing.headline: Pick a plan. Start free.
pricing.subtext: All plans include sourcing, writing, sending, deliverability, follow-ups, and meeting booking. The only difference is volume.
pricing.starterTagline: For founders making their first 100 cold reaches
pricing.proTagline: For startups scaling outbound past first traction
pricing.powerTagline: For sales teams who need volume without losing quality
pricing.footerNote: All plans include 14-day free trial. No credit card required. Cancel anytime.

stackComparison.headline: Three ways to ship outbound. One that makes sense before $1M ARR.
stackComparison.subtext: Most founders don't realize they have three options. Until they've sunk a quarter into the wrong one.
stackComparison.opt1Con1: Each tool needs its own ICP, copy, sequences
stackComparison.opt2Desc: Bring in a full-time outbound hire
stackComparison.opt2Con1: Can't hire before product-market fit is clear
stackComparison.opt2Con2: Still needs the same 5 tools as Option 1
stackComparison.opt3PriceNote: + no recruiting, no setup hell, no manual coordination
stackComparison.opt3Pro2: You approve every email. AI you control.
stackComparison.opt3Con1: Built for founders and early-stage teams, not enterprise sales orgs
stackComparison.cta: Start free trial — no credit card

builtForFounders.headline: AI you control. Not AI that runs wild.
builtForFounders.subtext: We built Mirvo after watching too many AI SDR tools promise autopilot and deliver auto-spam. Founders deserve outbound infrastructure they can trust, and that means staying in the loop on what gets sent in their name.
builtForFounders.p0Body: You shouldn't have to schedule a 45-minute call with a sales engineer to learn what an outbound product costs. Pricing is on this page. Setup is self-serve.
builtForFounders.p1Body: Every email Mirvo writes lands in your queue first. You approve in one click, or set autopilot once you trust the cadence. Mirvo never sends in your name without your say-so.
builtForFounders.p2Body: No per-user multipliers. No 5-seat minimum annual contract. No enterprise tier you'll get pushed into. Three plans. One can fit you. Cancel anytime.
builtForFounders.p3Title: Built by founders. Used by founders.
builtForFounders.p3Body: Mirvo is built by people who ran outbound themselves before AI made it possible to systematize. We use it on Mirvo. If something feels broken, we hear about it the same day you do.
builtForFounders.closing: If that sounds like the outbound product you'd build for yourself, you'll feel at home here.
builtForFounders.cta: Start free trial — no credit card

limitsAndRoadmap.headline: What we don't do. And what's coming next.
limitsAndRoadmap.limit0Title: You want to send 10,000+ emails per day.
limitsAndRoadmap.limit0Body: Mirvo is built for quality, not volume. If your strategy is high-volume spray-and-pray, you'll outgrow our caps fast. Try a dedicated high-volume sending platform.
limitsAndRoadmap.limit1Title: You manage a 20+ person SDR team.
limitsAndRoadmap.limit1Body: Mirvo is for solo founders and early-stage teams. If you have a full SDR org, you need Salesloft or Outreach: different category, different price.
limitsAndRoadmap.limit2Title: You need LinkedIn, WhatsApp, and voice today.
limitsAndRoadmap.limit2Body: Mirvo is email-first for V1. LinkedIn integration is on the roadmap for Q3 2026. WhatsApp and voice are not planned: they're separate problems.
limitsAndRoadmap.limit3Title: You want a fully autonomous AI.
limitsAndRoadmap.limit3Body: Mirvo drafts, but you approve. We don't ship sends-without-approval-by-default because that's how reputations get burned. AI you control is a feature, not a limitation.
limitsAndRoadmap.roadmap0Body: Multi-account LinkedIn integrated into your campaigns. Sequencing across email and LinkedIn.
limitsAndRoadmap.roadmap1Body: Pull call recordings from Fathom or Fireflies. Mirvo summarizes outcomes and updates the deal status automatically.
limitsAndRoadmap.roadmap2Body: After the meeting, Mirvo drafts the follow-up proposal based on what was discussed. You approve, you send. From cold to closed.
limitsAndRoadmap.disclaimer: Roadmap is directional, not contractual: we ship when it's right, not when the calendar says so.

faq.headline: Questions you probably have.
faq.q1Question: How is Mirvo different from other outbound tools?
faq.q1Answer: Most outbound tools are pure sending infrastructure: they help you reach a list at scale. Mirvo is the entire workflow: it finds the prospects, writes the emails, handles sending, and brings replies back to one inbox. You still need to connect a sending account, but Mirvo replaces the five tools around it.
faq.q2Question: Does Mirvo send emails automatically, or do I approve each one?
faq.q2Answer: You approve by default. Every email Mirvo drafts lands in your queue first. Once you trust the cadence, you can enable autopilot for a specific campaign. You set the threshold; Mirvo never flips that switch on its own.
faq.q3Question: Will this hurt my domain reputation?
faq.q3Answer: Mirvo starts warmup the moment you connect your account, before your first campaign runs. Volume ramps gradually, bounce and spam rates are monitored continuously, and sending pauses automatically if anything looks off. Most users see improved deliverability within 2 weeks.
faq.q4Answer: Mirvo pulls from a verified B2B database (290M+ contacts), filtered by your ICP: job title, company size, industry, tech stack, and funding stage. You can also upload your own list in CSV. Contacts are deduplicated against your CRM if you connect one.
faq.q5Question: How personalized are the emails actually?
faq.q5Answer: Each email is generated per recipient using public signals: LinkedIn profile, company news, recent funding, job postings, and website copy. Not mail-merge tokens. The output reads like something a good SDR would write after 20 minutes of research, not like "Hi [first_name]".
faq.q6Question: What CRMs does Mirvo integrate with?
faq.q6Answer: HubSpot and Salesforce are available on all paid plans. Pipedrive is on the roadmap for Q3 2026. If your CRM has a Zapier or Make connector, you can wire it up that way in the meantime.
faq.q7Answer: Yes. No annual commitment, no cancellation fee. You can downgrade or cancel from your account settings at any time. Your data is exportable before and after cancellation.
faq.q8Answer: Yes. 14 days, no credit card required. Full access to the Starter plan features. If you want to test Pro or Power features during the trial, contact support and we will enable them for you.

finalCta.headline: Your first meeting is one signup away.
finalCta.subtext: Set up in under an hour. No credit card, no annual commitment, no demo required.

footer.tagline: AI-powered outbound for founders who sell before they hire.
footer.footerTagline: Built for founders who move fast.

signals.headline: Describe what a buyer looks like. Mirvo watches for it every night.
signals.body: Tell Mirvo the trigger that turns a company into a buyer — in plain English. Every night it checks your prospects against that signal, flags the ones that match, and drafts the email ready for your approval. No RevOps hire. No data tools to wire together.
signals.visualSignalExample: “Companies that just raised a Series A”
signals.beat0Body: “Companies that just raised a Series A.” “Teams hiring their first sales rep.” Write the trigger like you’d say it out loud.
signals.beat1Body: Every night, Mirvo scans your prospects against your signal. You wake up to the matches, not the busywork.
signals.beat2Title: Reach out at the perfect moment
signals.beat2Body: Each match arrives with a tailored email already drafted. You approve, it sends. Timing does the rest.
signals.close: Doing this by hand means a RevOps hire and a stack of subscriptions. Mirvo does it from one sentence — while you sleep.

about.headline: We build cold outreach that doesn't feel cold.
about.subtext: Mirvo is a B2B platform built for founders and revenue teams who want to scale outbound without sacrificing quality. Our agents research, write, and send like your best SDR — except they don't sleep.
about.principleBody: Most "AI outreach" tools spray generic templates and burn sender reputations. We believe outbound only works when the message is genuinely relevant — and that's a research problem, not just a writing problem. Mirvo solves both.
about.builtByBody: Mirvo is built by Max, a founder operating from Montréal and Paris. We're a small team intentionally: fewer cooks, more taste.
about.getInTouchBody: For partnerships, press, or product questions:

contact.headline: Talk to us.
contact.subtext: Questions about the product, partnerships, press, or just want to share feedback? We read every message.
contact.bugBody: Existing users can report bugs directly from inside the app, under
contact.pressBody: Same email above. Expect a reply within 2 business days.

pricing.headline: Simple, honest pricing.
pricing.subtext: 14-day free trial on every plan. No credit card required.
pricing.promoTextPost: saves $50/month for 6 months on Pro & Power
pricing.teamDesc: For 2–10 reps. Shared inbox, team analytics, manager dashboard.
pricing.corporateDesc: Unlimited seats, SSO, dedicated CSM, SLA, custom data processing agreement.
pricing.finalSubtext: 14 days free on any plan. No credit card. Cancel anytime.
pricing.faq0q: Do I need a credit card to start?
pricing.faq0a: No. Your 14-day trial starts the moment you sign up — no payment information required.
pricing.faq1a: Yes, any time. Upgrades take effect immediately. Downgrades apply at the next billing cycle.
pricing.faq2a: A prospect is a contact added to your outreach list. Enrichments (company data, LinkedIn, etc.) are counted separately.
pricing.faq3q: What happens if I hit my monthly cap?
pricing.faq3a: By default, actions are blocked at 100% of your cap. You can enable overage for enrichments at $0.50/lead in your billing settings.
pricing.faq4a: Yes — pay yearly and save 20%. Starter $1,430/yr · Pro $2,870/yr · Power $3,830/yr.
pricing.faq5a: If you're not satisfied in your first 30 days after upgrading, contact us and we'll make it right.

legal.dpaNonNegotiable: Non-negotiable DPA. As a small organization without dedicated legal staff, Mirvo cannot accept customer-modified versions of this DPA. The provisions herein incorporate standard contractual terms approved by the European Commission and are the same for all subscribers.
